hooks.command: bash -c 'changed="$CLAUDE_FILE"; if [[ "$changed" == *.el ]]; then emacs --batch -Q -L . -L lisp --eval "(byte-compile-file \"$changed\")" 2>&1 && rm -f "${changed}c" && echo "[hook] $changed: byte-compile OK" || echo "[hook] $changed: byte-compile FAILED"; fi'

bash -c 'echo "[hook] Pre-commit lint check..."; fail=0; for f in early-init.el init.el lisp/*.el; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then emacs --batch -Q -L . -L lisp --eval "(byte-compile-file \"$f\")" 2>/dev/null; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "[hook] FAIL: $f"; fail=1; fi; rm -f "${f}c"; fi; done; if [ $fail -eq 1 ]; then echo "[hook] Byte-compile errors detected. Fix before committing."; exit 1; fi; echo "[hook] All .el files compile clean."'
